phases.title: Self-Compliance Hardening — CI Enforcement, Compliance Validator & Protocol Hardening
phases.note: Lifecycle: proposed 2026-07-08 (planner; schema enum has no 'proposed' value, so 'pending' + activation_state was used) -> activated 2026-07-08 on human authorization ('approved. please proceed.', run_state event phase_activated) -> completed 2026-07-08 (run_state event phase_complete). Status/activation_state/current_phase now all reflect the completed, previously-active state; this note superseded the original proposal-time wording, which had gone stale after activation (PR #3 review finding).

phases.title: Durable Enforcement & Dogfooding — Narrative-Truth CI Checks, Vetted Verification Library, E2E Bootstrap Test & Schema Dogfooding
phases.note: PROPOSED 2026-07-08 by @planner (spec .agent/product_spec_004.md, feature_list_004.json: 8 features 023-030, DAG validated acyclic, original_estimate_lines=1250). NOT ACTIVATED — awaiting human authorization (same pre-activation lifecycle as phases 002/003: schema enum has no 'proposed' value, so 'pending' + activation_state 'proposed' is used; current_phase stays 003-communication until activation). Realizes four recommendations: R1 narrative-truth CI checks C9 (path resolution) + C10 (single-source-of-truth consistency); R2 hermetic end-to-end consumer-bootstrap test + CI job; R3 tools/verify_lib.sh vetted verification-helper library + a verification-authoring standard in methodology/02; R4 schema reconciliation (qa_verdict union + new contract_review schema) + C11 dogfood validation of the framework's own .agent/ artifacts, resolving NDEBT-002. Adding C9/C10/C11 migrates the validator SUMMARY from '8 passed' to '11 passed' (immutable historical records keep '8 passed'). Execution MUST begin after phase-003 PR #5 merges (rebase onto main); the checks are proven non-breaking against the current tree. Human gate at close: v0.4.0 release (MINOR; additive, no breaking runtime change, bootstrap.sh unmodified) — recorded, not executed.
